# app-13272-lead-field — scripts

Untag pending records in social-media. Use when tracking inactive sprint changes, tracking active entry changes, deleteing categorys by entry, updateing rows by appointment. Returns matching records with metadata. Supports filtering by exclusive subscriber fields.
